title: Subscribe to the cosmetics mailing list - Canada.ca
content:
## Subscribe to the cosmetics mailing list
Subscribe to our electronic cosmetics mailing list to receive the latest news and information about cosmetic products.
Membership on the electronic mailing list is open to the public. Subscribers receive updates when Health Canada posts new information, consumer advisories, guidances or consultation documents on cosmetic products.
We encourage you to share this address with your colleagues.
To subscribe, please enter your email address and click on the "Subscribe" button.
You will receive an email confirmation where you must click on the link to activate your subscription.
Required fields are marked with an asterisk ( * ).

## Change your subscription
Changing your email requires unsubscribing under the previous email address and re-subscribing with your new email address.
To unsubscribe, please enter your email address and click on the "Unsubscribe" button.
If you have comments or questions about the program, please email us at cosmetics@hc-sc.gc.ca .
